name: Chicken Fried Steak and Cream Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the steak and pound, if needed, to 1/2 inch thick. Cut into 6 to 8 pieces.
2. Combine milk, Tabasco sauce, and salt in a bowl.
3. Measure 1 cup of flour into a bowl.
4. Combine remaining flour, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper in another bowl.
5. Dip steak into flour, into milk mixture, and then into seasoned flour. Set aside until all meat is coated.
6. Heat 1 or 2 inches of oil in a frying pan.
7. Fry meat until both sides are golden brown, about 2 minutes per side. Drain on paper towels.
8. Serve with cream gravy, mashed potatoes, and gravy.
CREAM SAUCE:
- Pour off all but 6 tbsp fat from the frying pan.
- Add 6 tbsp flour into the pan (use any leftover seasoned flour) and blend well.
- Gradually stir in 2 1/2 cups milk. Cook and stir over medium heat until thickened.
- Season with salt and pepper. Cover steaks with gravy when served. Makes 2 cups.
